synthesized_prompt: Start with the view from the first image, showing the high-angle perspective of the light wood cabinet with blue trim and the white doorway frame enclosing the brown door. Over the next five seconds, tilt the camera down and pan right to reveal the sink and countertop with dishes and cleaning supplies. Then, continue descending and pan left to bring the cooking ingredients and the black pot on the stovetop into view. Next, slide left and pan sharply left to emphasize the microwave, kettle, and rice cooker on the left side of the counter. As the video progresses, move the camera backward while continuing the leftward pan and roll to show more of the left wall and appliances. Finally, move down again while panning left and tilting up to focus on the stovetop and the left edge of the countertop, completing a complex leftward rotation and downward displacement.

distilled_prompts.medium: Start with a high-angle view of a light wood cabinet with blue trim and a white doorway. Tilt down and pan right to reveal the sink and countertop with dishes. Continue descending and panning left to show cooking ingredients and a black pot on the stovetop. Slide and pan sharply left to emphasize the microwave, kettle, and rice cooker. Move backward while panning and rolling left to show the left wall and appliances. Finally, move down and pan left while tilting up to focus on the stovetop and countertop edge.
distilled_prompts.coarse: Start with a high-angle view of a kitchen cabinet, then pan and tilt down to reveal the sink, stovetop, and appliances like a microwave and rice cooker, ending with a focus on the cooking area.
